creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Created attachment 181113
svn diff for audio/pocketsphinx

I've been looking for (decent) speech recognition software,
and I notice audio/pocketsphinx appears to be falling behind
version-wise. So I'd like to maintain this.

Changes
change WWW, MAINTAINER
update pkg-descr to what their new web page lists

That's pretty much it!

Please see the attached svn diff; audio_pocketsphinx.diff for details.

Thanks!

--Chris
